productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Barracks Premier White Sports Shoes
description: Men's Barracks Premier These adidas Barracks Premier shoes can do it all. They feature a comfortable suede upper, a breathable mesh tongue and heel cushioning for every active pursuit. Upper Suede upper for soft and comfortable look and feel Air mesh padded tongue for breathability High-grip cord laces and central lace-up system for customised Fit Comfortable textile lining and padded collar High-visibility silver details for road safety at night Ergonomically shaped footbed Midsole adiPRENE® under the heel for superior cushioning at impact Outsole adiWEAR® outsole offers the ultimate in high-wear durability Lugs, grooves and pivot point give excellent grip and traction Non-marking for use indoors   Scare Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
